scheduler.note: Disable after ALERTED/EXPIRED/INVALIDATED. Revised B ladder is live at 2x; C is virtual/alert-only. Scheduled at close+8m, staggered 3 minutes after AAPL close+5m to avoid parallel watchdog load. If C triggers, cancel/block B through normal live-order workflow before accepting C.

globalInvalidation.note: Pre-C invalidation from GPT: thesis invalid if 4H breaks below fresh HL 188.7; after breakout, C ticket SL is 202.75.

breakoutFamily.orderTypeProposal: ALERT_ONLY confirmed breakout; after a closed 4H candle above 207.20, manually confirm/place C only if price is not above the 209.60 no-chase cap and B ladder exposure is cancelled/blocked first.

ticket.orderTypeProposal: ALERT_ONLY Case C conditional breakout long after 4H close confirmation
ticket.invalidation: No-chase: reject if price is already above about 209.60 before order can be placed; after entry, SL 202.75. Because revised B ladder is live, cancel/block B through normal live-order workflow before accepting C.

noImmediateRejectionConditions.description: current price remains at/below max acceptable entry/chase 209.60
